title: Bounded Bodies, JSON, Forms, Multipart Uploads, and Validation · Program Defense
summary: A production-readiness review compares near-miss decisions for bounded bodies, json, forms, multipart uploads, and validation and requires the smallest safe bounded request decoding and validation pipeline with changed-request evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded request decoding and validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use MaxBytesReader and server limits to bound actual body reads independently of absent, false, compressed, or chunked Content-Length.
Decode exactly one JSON value, reject trailing content and unknown fields when the contract is closed, and distinguish syntax, type, and size failures.
Separate transport shape validation from domain invariants, normalize only defined values, accumulate safe field errors, and preserve causality internally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
